content.text:
Collect Files

Collect all .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md files from all public repo at japer-technology/githubification-* into a new folder called analysis and rename each file to the name of the repo it is from.

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p analysis

repos=()
page=1
while :; do
  data=$(curl -sSfL "https://api.github.com/orgs/japer-technology/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(echo "$data" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  while IFS= read -r name; do
    repos+=("$name")
  done < <(echo "$data" | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
  page=$((page+1))
done

success=0
missing=0
errors=0
: > analysis/.collection-report.txt
for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  api_url="https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/contents/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
  status=$(curl -s -o /tmp/ghf.json -w "%{http_code}" "$api_url")

  if [ "$status" = "200" ]; then
    raw_url=$(jq -r '.download_url // empty' /tmp/ghf.json)
    if [ -n "$raw_url" ]; then
      curl -sSfL "$raw_url" -o "analysis/${repo}.md"
      echo "OK    ${repo} -> analysis/${repo}.md" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      success=$((success+1))
    else
      echo "ERR   ${repo} -> no download_url" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      errors=$((errors+1))
    fi
  elif [ "$status" = "404" ]; then
    echo "MISS  ${repo} -> .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md not found" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    missing=$((missing+1))
  else
    echo "ERR   ${repo} -> HTTP ${status}" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    errors=$((errors+1))
  fi
done

printf 'Repos matched: %d\nCollected: %d\nMissing: %d\nErrors: %d\n' "${#repos[@]}" "$success" "$missing" "$errors"
ls -1 analysis | wc -l

    repos+=("$name")
  done < <(echo "$data" | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
  page=$((page+1))
done

success=0
missing=0
errors=0
: > analysis/.collection-report.txt
for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  api_url="https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/contents/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md"
  status=$(curl -s -o /tmp/ghf.json -w "%{http_code}" "$api_url")

  if [ "$status" = "200" ]; then
    raw_url=$(jq -r '.download_url // empty' /tmp/ghf.json)
    if [ -n "$raw_url" ]; then
      curl -sSfL "$raw_url" -o "analysis/${repo}.md"
      echo "OK    ${repo} -> analysis/${repo}.md" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      success=$((success+1))
    else
      echo "ERR   ${repo} -> no download_url" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      errors=$((errors+1))
    fi
  elif [ "$status" = "404" ]; then
    echo "MISS  ${repo} -> .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md not found" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    missing=$((missing+1))
  else
    echo "ERR   ${repo} -> HTTP ${status}" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    errors=$((errors+1))
  fi
done

printf 'Repos matched: %d\nCollected: %d\nMissing: %d\nErrors: %d\n' "${#repos[@]}" "$success" "$missing" "$errors"
ls -1 analysis | wc -l
"}

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
repos=$(curl -sSfL 'https://api.github.com/orgs/japer-technology/repos?per_page=100' | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
for repo in $repos; do
  paths=$(curl -sSfL "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/git/trees/HEAD?recursive=1" | jq -r '.tree[].path' | grep -i 'analysis' || true)
  if [ -n "$paths" ]; then
    echo "== $repo =="
    echo "$paths" | head -n 10
  fi
done

  paths=$(curl -sSfL "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/git/trees/HEAD?recursive=1" | jq -r '.tree[].path' | grep -i 'analysis' || true)
  if [ -n "$paths" ]; then
    echo "== $repo =="
    echo "$paths" | head -n 10
  fi
done"}

content.name: bash

arguments.command: if [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ]; then echo 'GITHUB_TOKEN is set'; else echo 'GITHUB_TOKEN is not set'; fi

content.partialJson: {"command":"if [ -n \"${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}\" ]; then echo 'GITHUB_TOKEN is set'; else echo 'GITHUB_TOKEN is not set'; fi"}

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
header=( -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' )
repos=()
page=1
while :; do
  data=$(curl -sSfL "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/orgs/japer-technology/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(echo "$data" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  while IFS= read -r name; do repos+=("$name"); done < <(echo "$data" | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
  page=$((page+1))
done

echo "Matched repos: ${#repos[@]}"
found=0
for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  has=$(curl -sSfL "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/git/trees/HEAD?recursive=1" | jq -r '.tree[].path' | grep -Fx '.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md' || true)
  if [ -n "$has" ]; then
    echo "$repo"
    found=$((found+1))
  fi
done
echo "Found exact filename in ${found} repos"

    echo "$repo"

  fi
done
echo "Found exact filename in ${found} repos""}

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
header=( -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' )
repos=()
page=1
while :; do
  data=$(curl -sSfL "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/orgs/japer-technology/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(echo "$data" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  while IFS= read -r name; do repos+=("$name"); done < <(echo "$data" | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
  page=$((page+1))
done

for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  path=$(curl -sSfL "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/git/trees/HEAD?recursive=1" | jq -r '.tree[].path' | grep -Fx '.ANALYSIS-Githubification.md' || true)
  if [ -n "$path" ]; then echo "$repo"; fi
done | tee /tmp/analysis_repos.txt

echo "count=$(wc -l < /tmp/analysis_repos.txt)"

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p analysis
rm -f analysis/*.md analysis/.collection-report.txt

header=( -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' )
repos=()
page=1
while :; do
  data=$(curl -sSfL "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/orgs/japer-technology/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}")
  count=$(echo "$data" | jq 'length')
  [ "$count" -eq 0 ] && break
  while IFS= read -r name; do repos+=("$name"); done < <(echo "$data" | jq -r '.[] | select(.name | startswith("githubification-")) | .name')
  page=$((page+1))
done

success=0
missing=0
errors=0
for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  selected_path=''

  # First: exact requested filename
  status=$(curl -s -o /tmp/content.json -w "%{http_code}" "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/contents/.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md")
  if [ "$status" = "200" ]; then
    selected_path='.GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md'
  else
    # Fallback: existing filename in these repos
    status2=$(curl -s -o /tmp/content.json -w "%{http_code}" "${header[@]}" "https://api.github.com/repos/japer-technology/${repo}/contents/.ANALYSIS-Githubification.md")
    if [ "$status2" = "200" ]; then
      selected_path='.ANALYSIS-Githubification.md'
      status="$status2"
    else
      status="$status2"
    fi
  fi

  if [ -n "$selected_path" ]; then
    content=$(jq -r '.content' /tmp/content.json | tr -d '\n')
    if [ "$content" = "null" ] || [ -z "$content" ]; then
      echo "ERR   ${repo} -> empty content for ${selected_path}" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      errors=$((errors+1))
    else
      printf '%s' "$content" | base64 --decode > "analysis/${repo}.md"
      echo "OK    ${repo} -> analysis/${repo}.md (from ${selected_path})" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
      success=$((success+1))
    fi
  elif [ "$status" = "404" ]; then
    echo "MISS  ${repo} -> no .GITHUBIFICATION-Analysis.md or .ANALYSIS-Githubification.md" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    missing=$((missing+1))
  else
    echo "ERR   ${repo} -> HTTP ${status}" >> analysis/.collection-report.txt
    errors=$((errors+1))
  fi
done

echo "Repos matched: ${#repos[@]}"
echo "Collected: ${success}"
echo "Missing: ${missing}"
echo "Errors: ${errors}"
ls -1 analysis/*.md | wc -l
